user_text:

already planned. Your composition plan is in the system prefix.

your compositional choice for this cycle (this becomes the visible
"rationale" persisted alongside your tool calls; it is NOT private
chain-of-thought). Then make tool calls.

### RECENT DECISIONS

Cycle 7: Falling intensity on a held G# — the room is full enough; I'll let it breathe and add only one quiet text fragment as solitary testimony, accumulating the letter without crowding the muhayyar that's coming next cycle.
  - addText({"content":"what the room held","position":"lower-left","style":"serif italic, medium, soft warm parchment","reactivity":[{"property":"opacity","feature":"hijaz_intensity","map":{"in":[0,1],"out":[0.5)

Cycle 8: The only D arrives at the brightest centroid — I'll commit the muhayyar gesture with elevation: a background warming toward pale candlelight and a sustained luminous bloom that widens gently on the impulse, not a punch.
  - setBackground({"css_background":"radial-gradient(ellipse at 50% 50%, rgba(245,230,200,0.28) 0%, rgba(212,165,116,0.18) 25%, rgba(74,102,112,0.10) 55%, rgba(20,16,14,0.96) 82%, #0a0807 100%)"})
  - addSVG({"svg_markup":"<svg viewBox=\"-500 -500 1000 1000\" xmlns=\"http://www.w3.org/2000/svg\"><defs><radialGradient id=\"bloom\" cx=\"0.5\" cy=\"0.5\" r=\"0.5\"><stop offset=\"0\" stop-color=\"#f5e6c8\" st)
  - addText({"content":"a held breath, releasing","position":"lower-center","style":"serif italic, medium, pale candlelight, generous tracking","reactivity":[{"property":"opacity","feature":"hijaz_intensity","map)

Cycle 9: The arrival commits with a composite: a hand cupped around a small flame as photographic anchor, a soft warm bloom behind it, and a phrase of testimony — elevation, not impact.
  - addCompositeScene({"elements":[{"type":"image","query":"single hand cupped around a small candle flame in low light, intimate","position":"center-left, large","motion":{"preset":"breathe","feature":"hijaz_intensity","i)

### FUTURE PREVIEW

Cycle 14 (t=75s): Intense, falling. Bright timbre. Dense articulation. Tonal center B with secondary emphasis on A. Mid-performance.
Cycle 15 (t=80s): Moderate intensity, building. Balanced timbre. Rapid articulation. Tonal center C#. Mid-performance.
Cycle 16 (t=85s): Moderate intensity, falling. Dark timbre. Very sparse articulation. Tonal center A with secondary emphasis on G#. Mid-performance.

### COMPOSITION INTENT FOR THIS CYCLE

Active act: sustained middle — density without rupture (Dense articulation across F#, G#, C#, B. Vary earlier motifs rather than invent. A single feather might tremble; loose linen might drift; the back of someone at a window joins the room. One composite scene lives here.)
Cycle intent: Centroid spikes again on C#. Bright. Echo the early moonlight line in a new position; or transformElement on the held SVG.
Energy hint: rising

### TASK

Emit tool calls per `tools.json` (in the system prefix). Honor the
audited Bayati visual vocabulary. Do not output anything other than
the rationale text block followed by tool calls.
